title: All of Evangelion Explained
wikitext:
[]: All of Evangelion Explained             Quote Post by ClassyCrusader0330 » Fri May 10, 2024 2:54 pm Wasnt sure where to post this; ive been into film since i was a kid and my father was a director that i also hope to be one day. Ive watched eva since i was 13 (34 now) and feel i might have some information that might help explain eva in ways i havent heard before, and accumulated theories from some that i have. in order to hopefully make a video that explains all of evangelion to enrich the experience for those who watch it. Feel free to let me know what you think in the comments. Enjoy Also, feel free to skip the intro and timeline if you already know the history within the show. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HNPcyds7xSI&t=1501s

[]: Re: All of Evangelion Explained             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri May 10, 2024 5:32 pm I appreciate the contribution, but I request that you delete your repeated posts on the other forums. This is the appropriate one.

[]: Re: All of Evangelion Explained             Quote Post by ClassyCrusader0330 » Fri May 10, 2024 8:28 pm Done, thanks for the heads up. Just because there was the Rebuild section and i tried covering everything i wasnt sure where to post it. Thanks for telling me
